turns.query: Analyze NOx emissions between Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd. and Hebei Yanshan Steel Group Co., Ltd. on 2025-06-08.
turns.actual_response:
2025年6月8日，两家企业均有完整的24小时NOx排放记录。

敬业冶金技术有限公司当日NOx总排放量为4360.64 kg，小时均值为181.69 kg/h。河北燕山钢铁集团有限公司当日NOx总排放量为3182.74 kg，小时均值为132.61 kg/h。

对比结果显示，敬业冶金技术有限公司NOx排放更高，较河北燕山钢铁集团有限公司高1177.90 kg，约为后者的1.37倍。排放量较高企业的编号为2417。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 识别两家企业，并按2025-06-08整日小时数据汇总NOx
query = text("""
WITH target_companies AS (
    SELECT id AS company_id,
           CASE
             WHEN name ILIKE '%敬业冶金科技%' OR name ILIKE '%Jingye Metallurgical Technology%' THEN 'jingye'
             WHEN name ILIKE '%河北燕山钢铁集团%' OR name ILIKE '%Hebei Yanshan Steel Group%' THEN 'yanshan'
           END AS target
    FROM polluting_company
    WHERE name ILIKE '%敬业冶金科技%' OR name ILIKE '%Jingye Metallurgical Technology%'
       OR name ILIKE '%河北燕山钢铁集团%' OR name ILIKE '%Hebei Yanshan Steel Group%'
),
match_summary AS (
    SELECT target, COUNT(*) AS matched_companies, MIN(company_id) AS company_id
    FROM target_companies
    WHERE target IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY target
),
emission_summary AS (
    SELECT tc.target,
           MIN(tc.company_id) AS company_id,
           COUNT(*) AS hourly_records,
           COUNT(e.nox) AS valid_nox_records,
           SUM(e.nox)::float AS total_nox,
           AVG(e.nox)::float AS mean_nox
    FROM target_companies tc
    LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e
      ON e.company_id = tc.company_id
     AND e.timestamp >= '2025-06-08 00:00:00'
     AND e.timestamp <  '2025-06-09 00:00:00'
    WHERE tc.target IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY tc.target
)
SELECT ms.target, ms.matched_companies, es.company_id, es.hourly_records, es.valid_nox_records,
       es.total_nox, es.mean_nox
FROM match_summary ms
LEFT JOIN emission_summary es ON ms.target = es.target
ORDER BY ms.target
""")
df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)

print("企业匹配与2025-06-08 NOx汇总：")
print(df.to_string(index=False))

jingye = df[df["target"] == "jingye"].iloc[0]
yanshan = df[df["target"] == "yanshan"].iloc[0]

total_nox_jingye = float(jingye["total_nox"]) if pd.notna(jingye["total_nox"]) else float("nan")
mean_nox_jingye = float(jingye["mean_nox"]) if pd.notna(jingye["mean_nox"]) else float("nan")
total_nox_yanshan = float(yanshan["total_nox"]) if pd.notna(yanshan["total_nox"]) else float("nan")
mean_nox_yanshan = float(yanshan["mean_nox"]) if pd.notna(yanshan["mean_nox"]) else float("nan")
higher_nox_company_id = int(jingye["company_id"] if total_nox_jingye > total_nox_yanshan else yanshan["company_id"])

print("\n关键变量已赋值：")
print({
    "total_nox_jingye": total_nox_jingye,
    "mean_nox_jingye": mean_nox_jingye,
    "total_nox_yanshan": total_nox_yanshan,
    "mean_nox_yanshan": mean_nox_yanshan,
    "higher_nox_company_id": higher_nox_company_id
})

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 重新定位“敬业冶金科技”，采用中英文及关键词组合匹配；同时保留已识别的燕山钢铁集团
candidate_query = text("""
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE name ILIKE '%敬业%') AS jingye_keyword_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE name ILIKE '%敬业%' AND name ILIKE '%冶金%' AND name ILIKE '%科技%') AS jingye_metallurgical_tech_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE name ILIKE '%河北燕山钢铁集团%' OR name ILIKE '%Hebei Yanshan Steel Group%') AS yanshan_count,
  STRING_AGG(id::text || ':' || name, ' | ' ORDER BY id)
    FILTER (WHERE name ILIKE '%敬业%' AND (name ILIKE '%冶金%' OR name ILIKE '%科技%')) AS jingye_relevant_candidates
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name ILIKE '%敬业%'
   OR name ILIKE '%Jingye%'
   OR name ILIKE '%河北燕山钢铁集团%'
   OR name ILIKE '%Hebei Yanshan Steel Group%'
""")
candidate_df = pd.read_sql(candidate_query, engine)
print("企业定位汇总：")
print(candidate_df.to_string(index=False))

summary_query = text("""
WITH target_companies AS (
    SELECT id AS company_id,
           CASE
             WHEN (name ILIKE '%敬业%' AND name ILIKE '%冶金%' AND name ILIKE '%科技%')
                  OR name ILIKE '%Jingye%Metallurgical%Technology%' THEN 'jingye'
             WHEN name ILIKE '%河北燕山钢铁集团%' OR name ILIKE '%Hebei Yanshan Steel Group%' THEN 'yanshan'
           END AS target
    FROM polluting_company
    WHERE (name ILIKE '%敬业%' AND name ILIKE '%冶金%' AND name ILIKE '%科技%')
       OR name ILIKE '%Jingye%Metallurgical%Technology%'
       OR name ILIKE '%河北燕山钢铁集团%'
       OR name ILIKE '%Hebei Yanshan Steel Group%'
),
emission_summary AS (
    SELECT tc.target,
           MIN(tc.company_id) AS company_id,
           COUNT(e.id) AS hourly_records,
           COUNT(e.nox) AS valid_nox_records,
           SUM(e.nox)::float AS total_nox,
           AVG(e.nox)::float AS mean_nox
    FROM target_companies tc
    LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e
      ON e.company_id = tc.company_id
     AND e.timestamp >= '2025-06-08 00:00:00'
     AND e.timestamp <  '2025-06-09 00:00:00'
    WHERE tc.target IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY tc.target
)
SELECT target, company_id, hourly_records, valid_nox_records, total_nox, mean_nox
FROM emission_summary
ORDER BY target
""")
summary_df = pd.read_sql(summary_query, engine)
print("\n2025-06-08整日小时NOx汇总：")
print(summary_df.to_string(index=False))

if set(summary_df["target"]) != {"jingye", "yanshan"}:
    raise ValueError("未能同时唯一定位两家目标企业，需根据企业定位汇总进一步确认。")

jingye = summary_df.loc[summary_df["target"] == "jingye"].iloc[0]
yanshan = summary_df.loc[summary_df["target"] == "yanshan"].iloc[0]

total_nox_jingye = float(jingye["total_nox"])
mean_nox_jingye = float(jingye["mean_nox"])
total_nox_yanshan = float(yanshan["total_nox"])
mean_nox_yanshan = float(yanshan["mean_nox"])
higher_nox_company_id = int(jingye["company_id"] if total_nox_jingye > total_nox_yanshan else yanshan["company_id"])

print("\n关键变量已赋值：")
print({
    "total_nox_jingye": total_nox_jingye,
    "mean_nox_jingye": mean_nox_jingye,
    "total_nox_yanshan": total_nox_yanshan,
    "mean_nox_yanshan": mean_nox_yanshan,
    "higher_nox_company_id": higher_nox_company_id
})

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 根据已返回的企业定位结果，“Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd.”对应“敬业冶金技术有限公司”，company_id=2417；“Hebei Yanshan Steel Group Co., Ltd.”对应company_id=2418
summary_query = text("""
SELECT
  company_id,
  COUNT(*) AS hourly_records,
  COUNT(nox) AS valid_nox_records,
  SUM(nox)::float AS total_nox,
  AVG(nox)::float AS mean_nox
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id IN (2417, 2418)
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-08 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp <  '2025-06-09 00:00:00'
GROUP BY company_id
ORDER BY company_id
""")
final_df = pd.read_sql(summary_query, engine)
print("2025-06-08两家企业NOx小时数据汇总：")
print(final_df.to_string(index=False))

jingye = final_df.loc[final_df["company_id"] == 2417].iloc[0]
yanshan = final_df.loc[final_df["company_id"] == 2418].iloc[0]

total_nox_jingye = float(jingye["total_nox"])
mean_nox_jingye = float(jingye["mean_nox"])
total_nox_yanshan = float(yanshan["total_nox"])
mean_nox_yanshan = float(yanshan["mean_nox"])
higher_nox_company_id = int(2417 if total_nox_jingye > total_nox_yanshan else 2418)

difference_total = abs(total_nox_jingye - total_nox_yanshan)
ratio_higher_to_lower = max(total_nox_jingye, total_nox_yanshan) / min(total_nox_jingye, total_nox_yanshan)

print("\n关键变量已赋值：")
print({
    "total_nox_jingye": total_nox_jingye,
    "mean_nox_jingye": mean_nox_jingye,
    "total_nox_yanshan": total_nox_yanshan,
    "mean_nox_yanshan": mean_nox_yanshan,
    "higher_nox_company_id": higher_nox_company_id,
    "difference_total": float(difference_total),
    "ratio_higher_to_lower": float(ratio_higher_to_lower)
})
